problem_solved: 65% of skin conditions are seen by non-dermatologists, and $55B is wasted annually in the US due to delays in patient care from diagnostic uncertainty
solution_description: Visual clinical decision support system specializing in dermatology and visual medicine. Helps clinicians identify conditions using images and clinical features. Supports appropriate referrals, prevents patient leakage, and reduces unnecessary hospital admissions. Used across hospitals, clinics, medical education, and life sciences
traction_signals: Used across IDNs, hospitals, and clinics
17% revenue increase potential from reducing patient leakage
Medical education resources for clinical reasoning
Life sciences solutions for HCP engagement
Rural health focus expanding access to dermatology expertise
notes: Strong dermatology/visual medicine focus fills gap where 65% of skin conditions are seen by non-specialists. Rural health transformation angle is compelling. Supports health equity initiatives
